investing.title: Long-Term Compounder Watchlist Beta
investing.summary: This page is currently running in NSE-only fallback mode, so it ranks valuation context and annual price position but not deep business quality yet.
criteria: Valuation context from stock PE versus sector PE
Opportunity context from 52-week high and low distance
Short-term entry caution from large one-day price moves
limitations: The fundamentals provider is not configured or did not return enough coverage, so this page is using the lighter NSE-only model.
Free NSE data gives price, sector PE comparison, and 52-week range, but not deep balance-sheet or cash-flow metrics.
Add ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY to upgrade this page toward a true compounder screener.
